text: AI is increasingly common in the modern workplace. One major use is task automation, where repetitive jobs like data entry or scheduling are handled by software, freeing up human workers for more complex activities. Many productivity tools now include AI features that help with writing, analysis, and project management. Instead of replacing people entirely, the focus is on human-AI collaboration, where technology supports decision-making rather than making it alone. This shift will certainly change many jobs, requiring workers to learn new skills and adapt to working alongside AI. Ultimately, the goal is to combine human creativity with AI's speed and accuracy for better results.
